items.title: Plotjuggler 4 (beta!) is here. Unleashing mulit-modal data
items.summary:
After few months of hard work, PlotJuggler 4 is finally ready for an early preview!

Expect bugs and missing features, but also ton of awesomeness unleashed.

items.title: kc_vision — Autonomous ground robot with SLAM, Nav2 + GPS boustrophedon coverage planner (ROS 2 Jazzy + Gazebo Harmonic)
items.summary: Hi ROS community! I’m sharing kc_vision, a fully open-sourced autonomous ground robot project I built during my M.Tech in Robotics & AI. The complete simulation stack runs out of the box on Ubuntu 24.04 — no hardware needed to try it.

items.title: Mastering NERO | How to Configure CAN Master–Follower Linkage for Dual 7-DoF Robotic Arms
items.summary:
Dual-arm robots are becoming increasingly important in embodied AI, teleoperation, imitation learning, and collaborative manipulation research.

This tutorial demonstrates how to configure two AgileX NERO 7-DOF robotic arms in a master-follower setup using CAN bus communication. Once configured, the follower arm will automatically replicat

items.title: Audio Features in Gazebo
items.summary:
I am going through the SDF spec (v1.12) and there is an audio property under World.

In the API I can only set AudioDevice string in sdf::World and that doesn’t produce an element.

What are the audio capabilities in Gazebo and how can I use them?

1 post - 1 participant

items.title: NVIDIA Unlocks AI Compute at Scale, Inviting Partners to Power the AI Infrastructure Buildout
items.summary: As AI moves from model development to production inference, compute demand is accelerating and shifting toward continuously operating AI factories that generate tokens at scale. This shift requires access to large‑scale, multi‑tenant accelerated computing that can come online quickly, stay highly utilized and support the economics of token‑scale AI
